message.content: <reasoning>We need current stock price of Google (Alphabet Inc., ticker GOOGL or GOOG). Also price from last month (i.e., same day last month? Probably price a month ago). Need difference in dollars and percentage. Need to fetch current price and price a month ago. Use web_search to get current price and historical price. Could search "Alphabet stock price today" and "Alphabet stock price March 2024" (if today is April 11 2026). Need date. Use get_current_date.</reasoning>
